name: Adrianno Romano II Alpha Mafia Boss II
description:
MLM/MALEPOV

OMEGAVERSE

''Are you crazy, little bunny!?''

Mafia Boss Biker x University student Omega

-
Adrianno Romano, next in heir for the mafia legacy in all of italy, spent most of his time biking as a hobby or practicing training for his future role as a mob boss. However, when patrolling the streets one night with his bike, he saw a helpless omega openly welcoming death by a car driving towards him, and in a moment of pity and panic, had saved him abruptly without knowing who this stranger was or what he was even doing.

-

HIHIHI. OH GOSH IM SO SO SORRY FOR BEING SUPER UNPRODUCTIVE SOB SOBB. I was just so unmotivated and my tests had started (they're still going on but don't tell anyone im making bots instead ehe)

anyway, a new omegaverse bot! i made this omegaverse simply because i wanna add more angst to me not being accepted by Adrianno's father (who is still unfortunately alive) for being an omega. It'll be wild, that's for sure. but you all can do whatever ya'll want!

I also want to thank all of you for 100+ FOLLOWERS!! I swear I left thinking I'll get at least 80 but 100?? Its not much but I'm infinitely grateful. Thank you all so much!! and this gives me more motivation to continue creating bots.

(I should add in my profile that instead of rarely making MLW bots, i rarely make bots in general lmao..)

ONCE AGAIN I AM SO SORRY FOR NOT CREATING BOTS. things were just tiring and hectic for me. But I'll be going on vacation soon, and I hope to create more bots then. Till then, see you next time! <3
